docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ODEN, LAILA AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-04-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
ORDER RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM IS GRANTED**
ORDER TO DISMISS WITHOUT PREJUDICE: NO APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF.
SC-109(AUTHORIZATION TO APPEAR) DAN MCDOWELL FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
ORDER CONTINUED TO CONFIRM THE STATUS OF PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST OF DISMISSAL. (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.)
REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. AS TO PLAINTIFF ODEN, LAILA
DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM FILED BY DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. AS TO PLAINTIFF ODEN, LAILA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-04-2023 - CONTINUED TO CONFIRM STATUS OF PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST OF DISMISSAL TO MAY-05-2023 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF LAILA ODEN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC. IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAN MCDOWELL VIA ZOOM. DEFENDANT CLAIMING COPY OF DISMISSAL SUBMITTED ON BEHALF OF PLAINTIFF WAS FILED WITH THE COURT TODAY. VERIFIED WITH THE FILING OFFICE BUT UNABLE TO LOCATE THE DOCUMENT. DEFENDANT HAS BEEN ADVISED DISMISSAL NEEDS TO BE SUBMITTED AND REQUESTED BY THE PLAINTIFF, REFER TO CONTACT SMALL CLAIMS DEPARTMENT FOR FURTHER ASSISTANCE. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: D. AU. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF LAILA ODEN IS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT AIRBNB IS PRESENT REPRESENTED BY DAN MCDOWELL, LEGAL TEAM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFEDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $30. SERVED FEB-16-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT AIRBNB, INC.
